intro: Between April 13 and April 22, 2026, ZCyberNews published five reports detailing high-severity remote access trojan campaigns. The Lazarus Group was the primary threat actor identified, targeting the cryptocurrency, software development, and technology sectors. These attacks had a global footprint, with notable activity in Latin America. All five incidents were assessed as high severity, underscoring the persistent and significant risk posed by these intrusion tools during this period.
